mapper.select: SELECT id, source, title, summary, content, external_url AS externalUrl, image_url AS imageUrl, is_visible AS isVisible, is_pinned AS isPinned, published_at AS publishedAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM site_notices WHERE is_visible = TRUE ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, source, title, summary, content, external_url AS externalUrl, image_url AS imageUrl, is_visible AS isVisible, is_pinned AS isPinned, published_at AS publishedAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM site_notices WHERE id = #{id} AND is_visible = TRUE

SELECT id, source, title, summary, content, external_url AS externalUrl, image_url AS imageUrl, is_visible AS isVisible, is_pinned AS isPinned, published_at AS publishedAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM site_notices ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, source, title, summary, content, external_url AS externalUrl, image_url AS imageUrl, is_visible AS isVisible, is_pinned AS isPinned, published_at AS publishedAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM site_notices WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, source, title, summary, content, external_url AS externalUrl, image_url AS imageUrl, is_visible AS isVisible, is_pinned AS isPinned, published_at AS publishedAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM site_notices WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_notices ( source, title, summary, content, external_url, image_url, is_visible, is_pinned, published_at ) VALUES ( #{source}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{externalUrl}, #{imageUrl}, #{isVisible}, #{isPinned}, #{publishedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE site_notices SET source = #{source}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, external_url = #{externalUrl}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, is_visible = #{isVisible}, is_pinned = #{isPinned}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE site_notices SET is_visible = #{isVisible}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE site_notices SET is_pinned = #{isPinned}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
